text:
Scotiabankis thrilled to be a sponsor of the Jamaica Observer’s Olympic coverage. This year’s Games mark our triumphant and anticipated return to the global stage, and we are excited to witness our athletes perform at their best while representing Jamaica.

As a nation, we take immense pride in our sportsmen and women, whose dedication and excellence inspire us all. We believe in the power of sports to unite and uplift communities, and we are honoured to support our national team as they strive for greatness.

The unwavering spirit and determination of our athletes embody the values we cherish at Scotiabank. Let’s cheer them on together and revel in the national pride they bring to our hearts. Scotiabank is a long-standing supporter of Jamaican sports and honoured to be a part of this remarkable journey. We proudly stand behind our nation’s champions as they strive to achieve their dreams.





HOUSE RULES
title: Scotiabank urges Jamaicans to support Olympians - Jamaica Observer
description: Scotiabank urges Jamaicans to support Olympians
